ResearchProjectDef.label: acolyte armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft suits of armor from anima grass. This lightweight armor projects a protective field that blocks incoming damage, at the cost of neural heat buildup in the wearer.

ResearchProjectDef.label: shaman armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft suits of armor made from anima tree parts. The protective shield this armor emits produces less neural heat in the wearer, but the armor is heavier and harder to move in.

ResearchProjectDef.label: acolyte weapons
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft weapons made from anima tree parts and jade. These weapons vent the wielder's neural heat to deal additional psychic damage with every blow.

ResearchProjectDef.label: anima organs
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft artificial organs made from anima grass, bark, and jade. They tend to be less efficient than natural organs, but confer a variety of benefits based on the psychic sensitivity of the recipient.
